name: player career year with year splits
description: Test case for career year column with year splits to show career progression
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc.career_year as career_year_0, "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" as "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed" on "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "player_seasonlogs" as "tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc" on "tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc"."seas_type" = 'REG' where t94ac00224f565e211ce527fca507baed.career_year <= '4' group by player.fname, player.lname, tf16732414ad51076b5bdc46690f323fc.career_year, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 ASC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 20
